claims.claim: Hugging Face publishes the Open Hebrew LLM Leaderboard with covered benchmarks including HeQ, HebrewSentiment, Hebrew Winograd, Translation En<->He, and Hebrew Trivia (the canonical benchmark set this skill evaluates against).
The live Open Hebrew LLM Leaderboard space is at huggingface.co/spaces/hebrew-llm-leaderboard/leaderboard.

Dicta-LM 3.0 technical report (published February 2026 by Dicta) documents the 24B (Mistral-Small-3.1 base), 12B Nemotron (NVIDIA Nemotron Nano V2 base), and 1.7B (Qwen3-1.7B base) variants, plus a benchmark suite covering Translation, Summarization, Winograd, Israeli Trivia, and Diacritization.
Dicta publishes its Hebrew open-weight LLM family on Hugging Face under huggingface.co/dicta-il.

AI21 Labs publishes the Jamba family with Hebrew listed as a core supported language; the 1.6 family superseded the earlier 1.5 family, and Jamba-Reasoning-3B is the most accessible open-weight Jamba variant.
Cohere Labs publishes the Aya family (aya-expanse-8b, aya-expanse-32b, aya-23-8B, aya-23-35B) on Hugging Face under CohereLabs, with Hebrew listed among supported languages.
Yam Peleg publishes a series of Hebrew-finetuned open-weight community models on Hugging Face under yam-peleg, including Hebrew-Mistral-7B, Hebrew-Gemma-11B-Instruct, and Hebrew-Mixtral-8x22B.
EleutherAI's lm-evaluation-harness is the canonical open-source framework for running standardized LLM evaluations and is hosted at github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness.
UK AISI's Inspect framework for AI evaluations is hosted at github.com/UKGovernmentBEIS/inspect_ai.

HeQ is a Hebrew QA dataset published at ACL Anthology under the Findings-EMNLP 2023 paper aclanthology.org/2023.findings-emnlp.915.pdf with 30,147 questions sourced from Hebrew Wikipedia and Geektime.
The Israeli National NLP Program maintains a Hebrew-Resources catalog on GitHub at github.com/NNLP-IL/Hebrew-Resources.
HeQ_v1 is mirrored on Hugging Face by the Etelis user at huggingface.co/datasets/Etelis/HeQ_v1.

HebrewSentiment is the Hebrew sentiment dataset published by the Israeli National NLP Program at huggingface.co/datasets/HebArabNlpProject/HebrewSentiment; verify license and split sizes on the live dataset card before commercial use.
HebNLI is the Hebrew natural-language-inference dataset published by the Israeli National NLP Program at huggingface.co/datasets/HebArabNlpProject/HebNLI.

As of May 2026, the production LLM lines this skill evaluates include Anthropic Claude 4.7 (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku); Anthropic Claude 4.6 (Opus, Sonnet); OpenAI gpt-5 family; Google Gemini 3 (gemini-3-pro, gemini-3-flash); and Google Gemini 2.5 Pro as the legacy comparison point.
